# Merwan Guerrib

Merwan Guerrib is a freelance fullstack developer based in Marseille, France.

## Services

- Website development focused on conversion and lead generation
- Full-stack web application development
- AI automation development and integration
- n8n workflow integration and no-code automation
- SEO and GEO optimization
